title: Short title
doc_html:
§2702.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Social Work Practice Act".

Added by Acts 1972, No. 706, §1; Acts 1999, No. 1309, §7, eff. Jan. 1, 2000.
